data.description: 1.19.0 (Android, iOS, iPadOS, Fire, Windows, Xbox, PlayStation) or 1.19.1 (Nintendo Switch), the first release of The Wild Update, is a major update to Bedrock Edition released on June 7, 2022. The update was first announced on October 16, 2021 during Minecraft Live 2021.  It introduces the deep dark biome, the mangrove swamp biome, mobs like the allay, the frog, the tadpole, the warden, and some new items included like sculk blocks and other items that are useful and for decorations.
